base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_per_dungeon_palette_variants — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Per-dungeon palette recolors — 9 dungeon-level palette variants of wall/floor tiles (Level 1 blue, Level 2 red, Level 3 green etc). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Per-dungeon palette recolors — 9 dungeon-level palette variants of wall/floor tiles (Level 1 blue, Level 2 red, Level 3 green etc)
